title: FOSTER PARENT RESOURCES - 211info
text: FOSTERCLUB FOSTER PARENT RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resource parents of foster youth resources that are youth-informed to help provide perspective on how to be the best support for a young person in care. 620 S Holladay Drive #1 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Resource Parents Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 717-1552 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 717-1552 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Parenting Helplines * Foster Parents Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - FOSTER PARENT ONLINE TRAINING INFORMATION SERVICES - FOSTER YOUTH RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FOSTERCLUB
